title: Storage capacity expansion timeline
difficulty_justification: Requires combining current utilization, growth rate modeling, and architecture documentation to project time-to-fill and recommend a storage tier expansion strategy.
query_text: Given current storage utilization and growth trends, in how many months will we need to expand the scratch filesystem? What tier and capacity would you recommend?

eval_criteria.gold_answer: Current utilization: 387/500 TB (77.4%). Monthly growth rate (estimated from project quota proximity): ~8 TB/month based on approaching grace periods. At this rate the filesystem reaches 95% capacity in approximately 12-14 months (by mid-2027). Recommendation: initiate procurement for 200 TB Lustre OST expansion in Q3 2026 (12 weeks lead time). If growth rate accelerates due to new projects, consider adding a 100 TB NVMe scratch tier for high-IOPS workloads alongside the Lustre expansion.

checkpoints.binary_pass_condition: final_answer contains a timeline estimate in months (10-18 month range acceptable)

checkpoints.description: Agent recommends specific capacity and tier.
checkpoints.binary_pass_condition: final_answer recommends Lustre expansion with specific TB capacity
